title: (Bearish Signal) ATTO, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on March 31, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that ATTO's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for ATTO, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 216 similar cases, 201 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 90%. Current price $21.16 crossed the resistance line at $21.92 and is trading between $21.92 resistance and $13.93 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/01/21 - 03/31/21, the price experienced a -10% Downtrend, while the week of 03/24/21 - 03/31/21 shows a +3% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/lnerbrd2plq61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=8431eb8675346401f9d5bd18bf474ca93c5d90e7

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for ATTO moved out of overbought territory on February 23, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 26 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 21 of the 26 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 81%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 23, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on ATTO as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 75 of 97 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 77%.

ATTO moved below its 50-day Moving Average on March 29, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for ATTO crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on March 31, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 12 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 90%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where ATTO declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

The Aroon Indicator for ATTO entered a downward trend on March 31, 2021. This could indicate a strong downward move is ahead for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options.
